title: Deep-Fry Tunisian Chilli Paella
description: A salty and crumbly one-pot dish featuring green chilli and crispy fried tofu. Serve immediately to enjoy the crispy texture.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm, drained and cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large paella pan over medium heat until it reaches 350°F.
Add the tofu and deep-fry until golden brown and crispy, about 4 minutes. Remove from oil and set aside.
In the same oil, add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the rice and stir to coat with the spice mixture. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Add the sliced green chillies and bay leaves to the pan. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove the pan from the heat and stir in the crispy fried tofu.
Serve immediately, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
Discard the bay leaves before serving.
